emergency_definitions: Irrigation system flooding or uncontrolled water discharge
Downed trees blocking access or causing property damage

routing_rules.trigger: Irrigation flooding or major water damage

after_hours_handling: Collect emergency details and transfer to on-call crew. Non-emergency requests held for next business day.
fallback_logic: If transfer fails after 45 seconds, apologize, confirm on-call crew will respond within 30 minutes, and collect callback number.
integration_rules: Create Jobber job for every new service request
Tag emergency calls with URGENT label
special_constraints: Do not quote prices on the call
Do not schedule outside the service area
